overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character taking an elevator from a building lobby to the 96th floor, walking through a residential hallway, and entering a Japanese-inspired apartment with tatami flooring and an investigation board.

elevator doors open and character steps inside

metal elevator doors that open to reveal the car interior

wall-mounted panel with call button and floor indicator

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit apartment lobby. The camera approaches an elevator, presses the call button, and enters the elevator car as the doors open.

elevator arrives at 96th floor and doors open

segments.scene_description: Inside the wood-paneled elevator, the character rides up to the 96th floor. The control panel displays the destination, and the doors close then reopen to reveal the hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential hallway with vending area and apartment doors

events.description: passing the vending machine area where a woman is standing

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor past a woman at a vending machine toward the apartment

green illuminated exit sign above a doorway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the elevator into a long carpeted hallway illuminated by warm wall sconces. A woman stands at a vending machine to the left. The camera continues down the corridor past apartment doors and cleaning equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: Japanese-inspired luxury apartment with bedroom and office area

approaching the desk to examine the investigation board up close

agents.ego_description: entering the apartment and walking through the living space to examine the desk and investigation board

traditional Japanese straw mat flooring with dark borders
low white platform bed with upholstered headboard
black executive desk with gold trim and office chair
wall covered with pinned papers, photos, and notes connected by strings
traditional Japanese lattice window screens with neon city lights visible outside

segments.scene_description: The character enters a Japanese-style apartment with tatami mats and paper lanterns. The space features a platform bed and a desk with an investigation board covered in pinned papers. Neon city lights are visible through the lattice windows as the camera approaches the desk for a closer look at the evidence board.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit building lobby into the warm, residential corridors of a high-rise apartment. It begins in the shadows of the lobby, moving toward an elevator and entering the car as the doors slide open. As the elevator ascends to the 96th floor, the wood-paneled interior frames the destination on the control panel before the doors reopen to reveal a new environment. The scene then expands into a long, carpeted hallway illuminated by warm wall sconces, passing a woman at a vending machine and various cleaning equipment. The camera continues its steady progression down the corridor, gliding past a series of apartment doors toward the end of the hall.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the entrance of a Japanese-inspired apartment toward a detailed investigation area. It begins as the character steps into the room, revealing a space defined by traditional tatami mats and the soft glow of paper lanterns. As the camera glides further inside, the view passes a platform bed and captures the vibrant neon city lights filtering through lattice windows. The scene then narrows its focus, shifting from the open layout of the living space toward a desk in the corner. Finally, the camera closes in on an investigation board covered in pinned papers to provide a detailed look at the evidence.
